zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean DE CRÉQUY III於1335年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，他的父親Jean de Créquy II36歲，母親Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny30歲。他於1366年7月9日與Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean DE CRÉQUY III于1335年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛时，他的父亲Jean de Créquy II36岁，母亲Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny30岁。他于1366年7月9日与Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CRÉQUY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean DE CRÉQUY III was born in 1335, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean de Créquy II, was 36 and his mother, Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, was 30. He married Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke on 9 July 1366, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1397, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean DE CRÉQUY III est né en 1335, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean de Créquy II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke le 9 juillet 1366, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1397, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean DE CRÉQUY III 1335 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Créquy II 36 und seine Mutter Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny 30. Er hat am 9. Juli 1366 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1397 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean DE CRÉQUY III è nato il nel 1335 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Créquy II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke il 9 luglio 1366, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1397, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean DE CRÉQUY IIIが1335年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Jean de Créquy IIは36歳，母Marie Jeanne de  Picquignyは30歳であった。1366年7月9日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでDame Jeanne de Haveskerkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean DE CRÉQUY III(이)가 1335년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Créquy II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1366년 7월 9일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean DE CRÉQUY III nasceu em 1335, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean de Créquy II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke em 9 de julho de 1366, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1397, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean DE CRÉQUY III родился в 1335 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Créquy II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke 9 июля 1366 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1397 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean DE CRÉQUY III nació en 1335, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean de Créquy II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke el 9 de julio de 1366, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1397, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
